ddls:
CREATE TABLE "character_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the character class (e.g., Rogue, Hunter, Priest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the character class was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the character class is currently active or not */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the character class image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loot" (
  "loot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loot item */,
  "loot_name" TEXT /* Name of the loot item */,
  "loot_type" TEXT /* Type of loot (e.g., sword, shield, potion) */,
  "loot_rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the loot item (e.g., common, uncommon, rare, epic, legendary) */,
  "loot_level" INTEGER /* Level of the loot item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loot item */,
  "drop_rate" REAL /* Drop rate of the loot item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_loot" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character class */,
  "loot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loot item */,
  "loot_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of loot dropped for the character class */,
  "drop_rate" REAL /* Drop rate of the loot item for the character class */,
  "min_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity of the loot item that can be dropped */,
  "max_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum quantity of the loot item that can be dropped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id", "loot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character class chosen by the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the player account is currently active or not */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES character_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_loot" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "loot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loot item */,
  "loot_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of loot collected by the player */,
  "acquired_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player acquired the loot item */,
  "equipped" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the loot item is currently equipped by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "loot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the game version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game version */,
  "patch_notes" TEXT /* Patch notes for the game version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., loot drop rate, player engagement) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., loot drop rate, player engagement, player retention) */,
  "stat_description" TEXT /* Description of the statistic */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES game_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., game developer, analyst, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
